coding.display: Infection following a procedure, superficial incisional surgical site, initial encounter

code.text: Post-operative surgical site infection, laparoscopic appendectomy port site

bodySite.text: Right lower quadrant, 12 mm port incision site

note.text: Post-operative surgical site infection at right lower quadrant 12 mm port site following laparoscopic appendectomy for perforated gangrenous appendicitis (01/12/2026). Presentation with fever, purulent drainage, surrounding erythema and induration. Leukocytosis with left shift and elevated CRP. Readmission within 30 days of index surgery for IV antibiotic therapy.

Readmission course (01/22-01/26/2026): Wound opened at bedside, irrigated, and packed. IV piperacillin-tazobactam x 4 days. Culture confirmed E. coli (pan-sensitive) and mixed anaerobes. CT showed 1.8 cm residual RLQ fluid collection (decreased from 2.3 cm), no drainable abscess. WBC and CRP trended to normal. Stepped down to oral ciprofloxacin plus metronidazole x 10 days. Wound granulating well at discharge.
